display_text: Leshrac Aghanim's Scepter: Nihilism — Turns Leshrac and nearby enemies ethereal, preventing attacks and amplifying magic damage while increasing Leshrac's speed. This upgrade counters physical damage dealers by making them unable to attack and vulnerable to magic burst, transforming Leshrac into an anti-carry zone controller in team fights.
search_text: Leshrac Aghanim Scepter Nihilism anti-physical damage ethereal magic amplification speed boost team fight control

display_text: Leshrac Aghanim's Shard: Split Earth — Causes the ability to repeat twice with increasing radius, creating delayed zoning and area denial. This upgrade counters stationary or slow-moving enemies by forcing repositioning and punishing predictable pathing, enhancing Leshrac's role as an area-control mage.
search_text: Leshrac Aghanim Shard Split Earth zoning area denial delayed damage anti-positioning
